goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'cinema'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should be in the 'west'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of cinema
Make sure you get postcode and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the west
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get price range
